title: Design an Analytics Platform
description: Design a product analytics platform that collects user events and powers dashboards, funnels, retention reports, and ad hoc queries. The system should support high-throughput ingestion, late events, schema evolution, and cost-efficient storage.
constraints: Ingest high-volume client and server events reliably.
Support near-real-time dashboards and historical analytical queries.
Handle schema changes, privacy requirements, and retention policies.
